title: AXIOM Timeline pass for incident reconstruction
action: Open the AXIOM Examine Timeline view across all artifact categories. Filter to the incident window. Tag key events (execution, file access, exfil staging, credential use). Cross-reference SRUM hourly data with Prefetch execution timestamps. Export the tagged subset as CSV for the report.
rationale: AXIOM's all-artifact Timeline is the single best surface for proving a chronological narrative across logon, execution, file access, and network events. Tags carry through to the Portable Case for prosecutor review.
expected_result: Tagged event list covering the incident window, with SRUM ↔ Prefetch corroboration on at least the key execution events.

axiom.action: AXIOM Examine → Timeline view → set the date filter to the incident window. Apply tags via right-click → Add Tag (use the case's tag scheme: Execution Evidence, C2 Communications, Exfiltration). Verify Prefetch execution timestamps line up with SRUM Network Connectivity / Push Notifications hourly buckets. File → Export → CSV (tagged only).
axiom.ui_path: AXIOM Examine > Timeline > Date filter / Tag / Export
axiom.notes: Pin the SRUM and Prefetch columns side-by-side to spot drift between the two sources of truth.
